prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第44名、2022年第44名、2023年第46名、2024年第44名、2025年第45名、2026年第42名，排名稳中有升，属顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑），但2026年周期内无显著负面事件；抖音热度总排名第97位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，与金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等招生专业高度匹配；统计学类、数学类等理学专业亦受益于学校整体学科实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，计算机类、电子信息/通信类热度较高，但中央财经大学以财经为主，工科专业占比较小；本省2026年物理类考生约206,500人，较2025年172,468人增加约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，属一线城市，对陕西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西理科组招生占比相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8808名、2026年扩招约16.3%使位次理论上移、但本省物理类考生增加约19.7%进一步加剧竞争、学校软科排名小幅提升、财经类专业热度中性偏稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显上移。预测最低位次约9718名，区间9218–10218名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 2515 → 3254 → 9964 → 8474 → 8808 respectively. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (9964), rebounding to 8474 in 2024, and slightly dropping to 8808 in 2025. Overall, rankings have shifted backward in recent years, with a baseline of approximately 8808 in 2025. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 38 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 43 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 50, an increase of about 16.3% compared to 2025, representing a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 44th in 2021, 44th in 2022, 46th in 2023, 44th in 2024, 45th in 2025, and 42nd in 2026, showing a stable or slightly rising trend. It is a top-tier finance and economics institution. In 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (declining application rankings for journalism and communication majors), but no significant negative events occurred in the 2026 cycle. Its TikTok popularity ranks 97th overall (rated as 'average'), with moderately low short video exposure. No obvious application gaps were recorded. Applied Economics is rated A, and Theoretical Economics is A-, highly matching enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics. Statistics and Mathematics majors also benefit from the university's overall academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/economics majors is assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', while computer, electronic information/communication majors are relatively hot. However, Central University of Finance and Economics focuses primarily on finance and economics, with a small proportion of engineering majors. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Located in Beijing, a first-tier city, the university has strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees. Its enrollment proportion in the Shaanxi science group remains relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8808, an enrollment expansion of about 16.3% in 2026 theoretically raises the ranking, but a 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees further intensifies competition, along with a slight rise in the Soft Science ranking and neutral-to-stable popularity of finance and economics majors, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to rise significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9718, with a range of 9218–10218.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Finance
- Finance Majors (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Economics Majors (Chengming Academy) (Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance), Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance), Public Finance (Fiscal Theory and Policy)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration Majors (School of Accounting) (Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Taxation (BIT Intelligence, Taxation Joint Training)
- Investment (including Investment, and Big Data Dual Degree Program)
- Public Finance Majors (Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Appraisal)
- Economics Majors (Intelligent Economy) (Economics, National Economic Management)
- Actuarial Science
- Digital Economy (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Statistics Majors (Statistics, Applied Statistics, Economic Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Computer Majors (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Mathematics Majors (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Business Administration Majors (School of Business) (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Management Science and Engineering Majors (Management Science (Business Quantitative Analysis), Engineering Management (Digital Construction and Management))
- Public Administration Majors (Administrative Management, Urban Management)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 9218–10218, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Public Finance, Investment, Actuarial Science, Digital Economy) as the main direction. Tier 1 Finance majors can be targeted as a stretch, while Tier 3 Statistics, Mathematics, and Computer majors serve as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<9218), you can prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were 282 → 579 → 496 → 509 → 560, showing a fluctuating and then shifting trend, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 560. In the past three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 496 and 560, remaining generally stable. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 44th in 2021, 44th in 2022, 46th in 2023, 44th in 2024, 45th in 2025, and 42nd in 2026, showing a steady rise and placing it among top finance and economics institutions. In 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (the journalism and communication major saw a decline in application rankings), but no significant negative events occurred in the 2026 cycle. Its Douyin popularity ranked 97th overall (rated as 'average'), with moderately low short-video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Applied Economics is rated A, and Theoretical Economics is rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching majors such as Finance, Fiscal Studies, and Economics, which strongly attract applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/financial majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' with overall popularity neutral and stable. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees. The university's enrollment share in Shaanxi's liberal arts group remains relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 560, the approximately 22% enrollment expansion in 2026 theoretically raises the ranking, but the approximately 17% increase in provincial history category examinees partially offsets the expansion effect. Additionally, the university's Soft Science ranking has slightly improved, and the popularity of finance and economics majors is neutral and stable. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly increase compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 650, with a range of 550–750.

- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics).

Tier 1 Finance majors can be attempted as a stretch, while Tier 3 Law and Business Administration (Business School) serve as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<550), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors.
